label: Transparent Bamboo motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma source
Primary request: Create only a bamboo culm and leaves motif for a Morphous design-system asset, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A structured botanical cutout of bamboo green segmented culms with straw cream node highlights, narrow leaf-green leaves, a few new shoot accents, dark ink-like grove shadows in the creases, and accurate bamboo culm ring structure.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop culm segments, leaves, or shoot tips. Vertical composition suitable for later transparent PNG extraction.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves smooth culm texture, node rings, leaf edges, straw cream highlights, bamboo green color, and ink-depth shadows.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform magenta color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no grove scene, no pot, no decorative background, no second subject, no panda, no cast shadow, no contact shadow.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive LIGHT MODE design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Bamboo" derived from the visible transparent bamboo culm and leaves cutout.
Critical canvas requirement: true wide landscape 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 style composition, not square, not portrait. Fill the full horizontal board with a clear grid and large readable labels.
Reference use: Use the visible bamboo motif as the source of truth. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from bamboo green culms, leaf green blades, straw cream node highlights, new shoot accents, culm gold warmth, grove shadows, and bamboo ink depth.
Required visible sections: Morphous Bamboo, Bamboo Culm and Leaves, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese product UI examples; labels: Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line charts, bar charts, empty state, loading state, error state, spacing scale, radius samples, border samples, shadow samples, texture samples, simple icon treatment.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style productivity system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px card radius, culm-segment navigation, leaf-angle dividers, structured calm workflow surfaces.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: bamboo green, leaf green, straw cream, new shoot, culm gold, pale culm, grove shadow, bamboo ink.
Composition: light straw-cream background, modular panels, small motif preview, clear design token swatches, wide dashboard preview across the center, compact component groups along the edges.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Bamboo", no illegible microtext.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a DARK MODE version of the visible Morphous Bamboo design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Critical canvas requirement: true wide landscape 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 style composition, not square, not portrait. Fill the full horizontal board with a clear grid and large readable labels.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent bamboo culm and leaves cutout and the visible light-mode Morphous Bamboo board as references. Preserve palette roles, component language, culm-segment navigation, leaf-angle dividers, spacing, Japanese typography, shadcn/tweakcn component coverage, and productivity dashboard structure.
Required visible sections: Morphous Bamboo, Bamboo Culm and Leaves, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from bamboo ink and dark grove, light text from straw cream, primary accents from bamboo green, secondary accents from leaf green and new shoot, culm gold charts and focus, grove shadow borders, subtle bamboo node overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels: Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric.
UI coverage: dark buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command search, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line charts, bar charts, empty state, loading state, error state, spacing scale, radius samples, border samples, shadow samples, texture samples, and simple icon treatment.
Composition: one comprehensive dark board, modular panels, small motif preview, clear design token swatches, wide dashboard preview across the center, compact component groups along the edges.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple or blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible microtext, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Bamboo".
